calendar.matters: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-05-2026 Continued To Jul-14-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were PES-23-306792 The Estate of Patrick Courtney and PES-26-309124 The Estate of Lola L. Courtney.

Appearances:
Thomas Wrobel for petitioner and with Stephen Courtney (via Zoom).
Ryan Meckfessel for special administrator Debra Dolch, who was also present.
Byron Sun for objector Pu Guang Xie (via Zoom).

Discussion was held regarding mediation, that there is outstanding discovery items that need to be addressed before they can attend mediation, that the current litigation in Ireland regarding real property is still on-going, that a creditors claim should be pursued on the real property in Ireland, and that parties are seeking a special administrator to be assigned to this matter. The Court encourages parties to continue talks and find a mutually agreed special administrator.

The matters are continued to July 14, 2026, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.
